headlines.headline: Xovol Goods wins industry award for excellence in automated logistics

sentiment.reasoning: Winning an industry award provides positive brand recognition but lacks direct financial impact on revenue or operations.

headlines.headline: Orevex Renewables reports 25% decline in operating income

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
